# Prof. Cesar Henrique Comin

> Assistant Professor at the Federal University of São Carlos (UFSCar), Brazil. Researcher in Computer Vision and Biomedical Image Analysis. Teacher of Digital Image Processing and Computer Vision.

## About

Cesar Henrique Comin is an Assistant Professor at UFSCar (Federal University of São Carlos, São Carlos, SP, Brazil). He specializes in Computer Vision, Deep Learning, and Biomedical Image Analysis, with a particular focus on blood vessel segmentation, representation, and morphometry, as well as interpretability of deep neural networks. He has published more than 70 peer-reviewed papers in journals and conferences.

ORCID: 0000-0003-1207-4982

## Research Areas

- Biomedical image segmentation (blood vessels, neurons, tree-like structures)
- Interpretability of deep neural networks
- Complex systems and network science
- Digital image processing

## Pages

- [Home / About](https://chcomin.github.io/): Personal landing page with biography, research overview, and teaching resources.
- [Publications](https://chcomin.github.io/publications/): List of 70+ peer-reviewed publications with links to Google Scholar, ORCID, Scopus, PubMed, Semantic Scholar, and ResearchGate.

- Computer Vision course (51 Jupyter notebooks): https://github.com/chcomin/curso-visao-computacional
